text: My 3yo loves this toy and my husband says it's well made. Perfect gift for a wife too!
Bought this for my 2yo puppy, holds up great against chewing.
As a mom of two in my third trimester, the lumbar support was a lifesaver during pregnancy.
My stepson is in middle school and uses this backpack every day.
When I was a teenager 20 years ago we had nothing like this. My granddaughter adores it.
Great for my 16-year-old girl who just started high school freshman year.
The female cashier recommended it. My twins (both newborns) sleep through the night now.
Solid build quality, fast shipping, exactly as described. Five stars.
